/etudiants.get:
from monprojet_sdk import MonprojetSdk

sdk = MonprojetSdk(
    timeout=10000
)

result = sdk.etudiants.get_etudiants()

print(result)
/etudiants.post:
from monprojet_sdk import MonprojetSdk
from monprojet_sdk.models import Etudiant

sdk = MonprojetSdk(
    timeout=10000
)

request_body = Etudiant(
    id_=8,
    nom="nom",
    filiere="filiere"
)

result = sdk.etudiants.create_etudiants(request_body=request_body)

print(result)

/notes.post:
from monprojet_sdk import MonprojetSdk
from monprojet_sdk.models import Note

sdk = MonprojetSdk(
    timeout=10000
)

request_body = Note(
    id_=2,
    valeur=8.44,
    matiere="matiere",
    etudiant_id=8
)

result = sdk.notes.create_notes(request_body=request_body)

print(result)
